intake_form.user_inputs: How to clean up your fridge

context_pack.company_context: [uncertain: No specific company or product mentioned for cleaning fridges]
context_pack.product_context: Refrigerator cleaning typically involves a series of steps to ensure hygiene and efficiency. Products commonly used include multi-surface cleaners, baking soda, and microfiber cloths. Specialized fridge cleaning products may offer antibacterial properties or environmentally friendly ingredients.
context_pack.industry_context: The home cleaning industry is increasingly focusing on eco-friendly and non-toxic cleaning solutions due to rising consumer awareness about health and environmental impact. Multi-purpose and natural cleaners are trending.

terminology_glossary.Multi-surface cleaner: A cleaning agent suitable for use on various surfaces without causing damage.
terminology_glossary.Baking soda: A common household product used for cleaning and deodorizing.
terminology_glossary.Microfiber cloth: A type of cloth made from synthetic fibers known for its high absorbency and ability to capture dust and dirt.

typical_workflows.traditional_process: Traditional fridge cleaning involves: 1) Removing all items, 2) Disposing of expired products, 3) Cleaning shelves and drawers with a suitable cleaner, 4) Wiping down surfaces with a cloth, 5) Reorganizing items back into the fridge. Optimized workflows may involve using specialized cleaners or tools for more efficient cleaning and sanitization.

[uncertain: any proprietary cleaning methods or products]

story_brief.video_goal: Teach viewers how to effectively clean their fridge using common household products.
story_brief.target_audience: Homeowners and renters looking to maintain a clean and hygienic refrigerator.
story_brief.cta: Try cleaning your fridge today for a fresher and more organized kitchen.
story_brief.user_inputs: How to clean up your fridge
key_points: Use multi-surface cleaners for versatility and efficiency.
Baking soda helps eliminate odors naturally.
Microfiber cloths are effective for dust and dirt removal.
constraints: Do not claim: specific company or brand associated with fridge cleaning
Do not claim: any proprietary cleaning methods or products

problem.content: Traditional fridge cleaning can be time-consuming and may not effectively eliminate odors or bacteria.

content: Remove all items from the fridge.
Clean shelves and drawers with a multi-surface cleaner.
Wipe down surfaces with a microfiber cloth.
Reorganize items back into the fridge.
